name: Panzarotti (Fried Cheese-Filled Crescents)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift the flour and make a well in the center.
2. Add butter (cut into pieces), a pinch of salt, and an egg yolk to the flour well.
3. Gradually mix in water until a smooth, elastic dough forms.
4. Shape the dough into a ball, cover, and let rest for at least 1/2 hour in a cool place.
5. Roll out the dough, folding it over itself a few times as if making flaky pastry, then roll thinly.
6. Cut circles about 3 inches in diameter from the rolled dough.
7. In a bowl, mix diced Mozzarella, cooked ham pieces, beaten eggs, grated Parmesan, nutmeg, and chopped parsley.
8. Spoon a small amount of filling into the center of each circle.
9. Brush the edges with beaten egg, fold over, and gently press to seal.
10. Heat oil in a skillet. When hot, dip the crescents in beaten egg.
11. Fry a few at a time until golden brown and puffed up.
12. Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
